goal: Add an excited hover effect to the sign-in button in LoginForm.tsx with a smooth gradient transition.
summary: Implement a hover effect on the sign-in button that animates the gradient colors with a smooth transition.

files_to_modify.purpose: Add hover effect and transition to the sign-in button.
files_to_modify.content:
<button
        className="mt-4 flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-r from-[#ff8a3d] via-[#ff5e4d] to-[#ff2d2d] text-white font-semibold rounded-2xl py-2.5 px-6 shadow-lg transition-all duration-150 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#ff8a3d]/40 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-60 disabled:cursor-not-allowed hover:bg-gradient-to-l hover:from-[#ff2d2d] hover:via-[#ff5e4d] hover:to-[#ff8a3d] hover:transition-all hover:duration-300"
        type="submit"
        disabled={submitting}
      >
        {submitting ? 'Signing in…' : 'Sign in'}
      </button>

acceptance_criteria: The sign-in button changes gradient direction on hover.
The transition is smooth and lasts 300ms.
notes: Ensure that the button maintains accessibility features.
